description: Weight total is arithmetically incorrect. The contract declares `Weight Total = 1.00` but the actual sum of the 15 CRIT weights is 1.10. Sum: 0.16 + 0.09 + 0.05 + 0.14 + 0.10 + 0.06 + 0.08 + 0.07 + 0.05 + 0.05 + 0.04 + 0.04 + 0.04 + 0.06 + 0.07 = 1.10. Strict-mode contracts must have weights summing to exactly 1.0 so weighted scoring is meaningful. With sum=1.10 the scoring is undefined and the contract fails the basic well-formedness check.
